description: The email template for confirming newsletter subscriptions is designed to work well with newsletters from different areas. Its main goal is to help people confirm their subscription to the newsletter. This way, they can stay connected to content and updates that match what they're interested in.

designer.description: I'm a self-taught UI Designer, always eager to learn and share my findings. Currently studying 3D modeling and illustration.
